title: Integration & End-to-End Prototype
goal: Integrate mobile frontend, ML pipeline, and backend API into a full end-to-end ASL translation prototype, supporting sign-to-text/audio and vice versa, with seamless UI/UX and offline capabilities.
scope: Integrate ML inference (TFLite + MediaPipe) into Flutter app for real-time ASL sign detection.
Connect Flutter app to backend API for user auth, syncing translations, and TTS audio playback.
Implement bidirectional translation: sign-to-text/subtitles/audio, and text-to-sign hints (if model supports).
Add UI feedback: animations for detection results, audio playback controls, responsive display of translations.
Ensure offline-first: ML runs locally, with optional backend sync for advanced features.
Handle errors gracefully: network failures, model inaccuracies, with user-friendly messages and fallbacks.
Test full user flow: onboard user, capture signs, display/output translations.
deliverables: Integrated Flutter app with ML plugins (tflite, camera, mediapipe) and backend HTTP client.
End-to-end demo: user logs in, captures ASL signs via camera, sees text subtitles and hears audio output.
Backend integration for storing user translations and syncing across devices.
UI enhancements: smooth transitions for results, chic animations, accessibility features.
Documentation of integration points, API contracts, and offline behavior.
Audit report and bug log for this phase.

examples.flutter_ml_integration: import 'package:tflite/tflite.dart'; await Tflite.loadModel(model: 'assets/model.tflite'); var output = await Tflite.runModelOnFrame(bytesList: imageBytes);
examples.backend_client: final response = await http.post(Uri.parse('http://localhost:3000/api/translations'), headers: {'Authorization': 'Bearer $token'}, body: jsonEncode({'signData': keypoints}));
examples.offline_sync: Use sqflite for local storage; sync on network available.

must_verify: Full user flow works: sign detection -> text/audio output, with accurate translations.
Bidirectional support is functional (at least basic text-to-sign hints).
App remains responsive with ML inference running in real-time.
Backend sync works when online; app functions offline for core features.
UI/UX is polished: resting colors, animations, responsive layout maintained.
Integration bugs (e.g., data format mismatches) are identified and mitigated.
corrections.json is created with fixes for any identified issues.
